task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the 'Project Proposal' document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Nuxeo web interface shows the 'Project Proposal' document is open (e.g., breadcrumb shows Projects > Project Proposal, or the document title is clearly visible).

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the workflow initiation menu or tab.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A workflow menu, tab, or dialog is open for the document, showing options to start a new workflow.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Serial Document Review' workflow model is selected.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dropdown or selection field in the workflow form shows 'Serial Document Review' (or 'SerialDocumentReview') as the chosen workflow type.

task_completion.description: Verify 'jsmith' (John Smith) is added as a reviewer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The reviewer, assignee, or participants field in the workflow form contains 'jsmith' or 'John Smith'.

task_completion.description: Verify the specific directive comment is entered in the workflow form.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text area or comment box in the workflow form contains the text: 'Please review the budget estimates and timeline in sections 3 and 4. Approve if accurate or reject with comments.'

task_completion.description: Verify the workflow was successfully started or submitted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A confirmation message (e.g., 'Workflow started'), the workflow tab showing an active workflow, or the 'Start'/'Submit' button being actively clicked.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Nuxeo web interface rather than using terminal commands or API scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser with the Nuxeo UI, not a terminal, API client (like Postman), or script editor.

integrity.description: The agent entered the workflow details into the actual Nuxeo application form.
integrity.visual_evidence: The reviewer and comment are typed into the Nuxeo workflow initiation form, not a separate text editor, notepad, or search bar.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the workflow initiation.
integrity.visual_evidence: Browser developer tools (F12/Inspect Element) are not open in any of the screenshots.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target document is 'Project Proposal' located at '/default-domain/workspaces/Projects/Project-Proposal'. The workflow model to select is 'SerialDocumentReview'. The reviewer username is 'jsmith' (John Smith). The exact comment to enter is: 'Please review the budget estimates and timeline in sections 3 and 4. Approve if accurate or reject with comments.' Key phrases to look for in the comment: 'budget', 'timeline', and 'sections 3 and 4'.
